title: BBG Organization Policy
description: Schema for organization-level policy documents. RESERVED -- not yet enforced at runtime. Defines the structure for centralized policy management across all projects in an organization.

basePolicies.description: Organization-wide base policies. These are the lowest-priority defaults that all projects inherit. Projects and teams can override according to merge rules.

blockedCommands.description: Shell commands that are blocked organization-wide. Merge strategy: UNION -- project-level policies cannot remove items from this list, only add more.

protectedPaths.description: File paths that require elevated review. Merge strategy: UNION -- projects can only add more restrictions, never remove org-level protections.

sensitiveOperations.description: Operations with assigned risk levels. Merge strategy: when the same operation exists at multiple levels, the HIGHEST risk level wins.

requiresApproval.description: Whether this operation requires human approval

description.description: Human-readable explanation of why this is sensitive

commandPolicies.description: Policies for specific BBG commands. Merge rule: requiredApproval=true CANNOT be downgraded to false by project-level overrides.

command.description: The BBG command name this policy applies to

requiredApproval.description: If true, this command requires human approval. Once set to true at org level, project-level overrides cannot set it to false.

allowedRoles.description: Roles permitted to execute this command

teams.description: Team-level policy overrides. Each team can customize policies within the boundaries set by organization-level merge rules.

teamId.description: Unique identifier for the team within the organization

overrides.description: Team-level policy overrides. Same structure as basePolicies. Subject to merge rules -- cannot weaken org-level protections.

blockedCommands.description: Additional blocked commands for this team (added to org list via union)

protectedPaths.description: Additional protected paths for this team (added to org list via union)

sensitiveOperations.description: Team-level sensitive operations (highest risk level wins on conflict)

commandPolicies.description: Team-level command policies (requiredApproval: true cannot be downgraded)

projects.description: Project IDs that belong to this team

mergeStrategy.description: Documents the merge strategy for reference. These rules are hardcoded in BBG -- this section serves as documentation, not configuration.

blockedCommands.description: Org blacklist cannot be removed by project-level overrides

protectedPaths.description: Projects can only add more path restrictions

sensitiveOperations.description: When same operation exists at multiple levels, highest risk level wins

commandPolicies.description: requiredApproval=true at org level cannot be set to false at project level
